suspected_bottleneck: N+1 database queries and missing response caching
optimization_hint: Add repository-level batching, introduce short TTL cache for portfolio summary, index portfolio_id and reporting_date.

suspected_bottleneck: Synchronous CPU-heavy calculation in request path
optimization_hint: Move heavy calculation to background worker or cache deterministic calculation results by input hash.

suspected_bottleneck: Multiple sequential LLM/tool calls and no prompt/result caching
optimization_hint: Parallelize independent tool calls, add Langfuse tracing, cache stable regulatory context and generated commentary drafts.

suspected_bottleneck: Large context window, repeated retrieval, sequential agent steps
optimization_hint: Reduce prompt size, add retrieval top-k limit, compress evidence, parallelize analysis agents, add timeout and retry policy.

suspected_bottleneck: Repeated loading of regulatory rules and slow evidence lookup
optimization_hint: Preload rule packs, add semantic cache for repeated controls, introduce async I/O for evidence retrieval.

suspected_bottleneck: Waterfall API calls and large uncompressed dashboard payload
optimization_hint: Use request batching, lazy-load AI panels, compress responses, add skeleton loading and client-side memoization.
